name: Strokes Gained Golf Simulator & Lessons
address: 6460 E Yale Ave E60, Denver, CO 80222
about: Strokes Gained Golf Simulator & Lessons is a dedicated indoor golf facility in South Denver, CO, offering advanced simulator technology and professional coaching for golfers of all skill levels. The venue is equipped with high-end Uneekor EYE XO2 launch monitors and Swing Optix cameras to provide precise swing data and video analysis, complemented by access to hundreds of world-class golf courses for practice and play. With a focus on data-driven improvement, the facility offers simulator time bookings, private lessons, and structured memberships, all supported by 25+ years of coaching expertise from founder Brent Mahlman and his team.
why_golfers_like_it: Professional-grade Uneekor EYE XO2 launch monitor provides accurate swing metrics
Swing Optix cameras offer visual feedback with slow-motion replay for detailed analysis
Unlimited simulator access to hundreds of championship courses for year-round practice
Expert coaching available for swing improvement and data interpretation
Flexible membership options with priority booking for regular players

No alcohol service mentioned; BYOB policy not specified

simulator_hardware.notes: Premium launch monitor with radar technology capturing ball and club data
